search:kubernetes+argocd-gitops:kubernet.content:
- **Install Argo CD**: `kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/argoproj/argo-cd/stable/manifests/install.yaml`
- **CLI Installation**: Download from [Argo CD GitHub releases](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/releases), e.g., `curl -LO https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/releases/download/v2.7.5/argocd-linux-amd64`
- **Login to Argo CD**: `argocd login <CLUSTER_IP>:8080 --insecure`
- **Create Application**: `argocd app create my-app --repo https://github.com/myorg/myproject.git --path path/to/app --dest-server https://kubernetes.default.svc --dest-namespace default`
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spec.source.repoURL`: Git repository URL.
  - `spec.source.targetRevision`: Commit SHA or branch name.
  - `spec.destination.server`: Kubernetes API server URL.
  - `spec.destination.namespace`: Target namespace in the cluster.
- **GitHub Actions Integration**: Use `argoproj/argo-cd-action` to trigger Argo CD sync on push events.
- **Latest Version Check**: Run `kubectl get pods -n argocd | grep argocd-server` and check for version in logs or use `kubectl describe pod <pod-name>`.
- **Audit Trail**: Access via Argo CD UI under "Application" > "Details" to view deployment history.

- **CLI Commands**:
  - `argocd app create <app-name> --repo <git-repo-url> --path <path-to-app>`: Create a new Argo CD application.
  - `argocd app sync <app-name>`: Synchronize the application with the latest commit in the repository.

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Argo CD: v2.7.0
  - Kubernetes: v1.24.0

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spec.source.repoURL`: URL of the Git repository.
  - `spec.syncPolicy.hookType`: Type of hook to trigger sync (e.g., `PostSync`).
  - `spec.destination.server`: URL of the Kubernetes cluster destination.

search:kubernetes+argocd-gitops:argocd k.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `argocd app create <app-name> --repo <git-repo-url> --path <manifest-path>`
  - `argocd app sync <app-name>`
  - `argocd app set <app-name> --sync-policy automated`
  - `argocd app set <app-name> --auto-prune true`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Argo CD: [Check latest version on GitHub](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/releases)

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `sync-policy`: Controls when to sync the application with the repository.
    - `automated`: Syncs automatically based on Git events.
    - `manual`: Requires manual triggers for syncing.
  - `auto-prune`: Automatically prunes resources that are no longer in the manifest.

- **CLI Commands**:
  - `argocd app create <app-name> --repo <git-repo-url> --path <path-to-app>`
  - `argocd app sync <app-name>`
  - `argocd app get <app-name>`
  - `argocd app set <app-name> --sync-policy automated`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - ArgoCD: v2.7.0 (as of my last update)

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `syncPolicy`: Defines how the application should be synced with the repository.
    - Example: `{ automated: {} }`
  - `destination`: Specifies where to deploy the application.
    - Example: `{ server: 'https://kubernetes.default.svc', namespace: 'default' }`
  - `project`: Assigns the application to a project for organizational purposes.
